demographics.audit_notes: Corrected 1990 racial demographics for Crestview (Tract 3.05) to align with Census data, distinguishing non-Hispanic White. Original `pct_white` (88.1) and `pct_hispanic` (8.5) were inconsistent with 1990 census conventions and later year trends. `pct_other` adjusted to balance sum. Rent burden data unavailable for this period at this geography.
Values are plausible linear interpolations between 1990 and 2000 Census data. Original values were directionally correct.
Values align well with 2000 Census data for Tract 3.05. `pct_white` is assumed to be non-Hispanic. Rent burden data unavailable for this period at this geography.
Values are plausible interpolations between 2000 Census and 2006-2010 ACS data. First year for estimated ACS-era metrics.
Values align well with 2010 Census and ACS 2006-2010 data for Tract 3.05.
Values align well with ACS 2011-2015 data for Tract 3.05.
Values align well with 2020 Census and ACS 2016-2020 data for Tract 3.05.
Values are plausible and align with ACS 2017-2021 data. Population is a linear interpolation.
Values align well with the latest available ACS 2018-2022 data.
Values are reasonable projections based on trends from the 2018-2022 ACS data.
Values are reasonable projections based on trends from the 2018-2022 ACS data.
Values are reasonable projections based on trends from the 2018-2022 ACS data.

property.audit_notes: Values align with 1990 Census for Tract 3.05. Property tax estimated at 1.9% of home value. Permits estimated based on infill development for the era.
Values are plausible interpolations. YOY change is annualized over 5 years (1990-1995). Property tax estimated at 1.95% of value.
Values align with 2000 Census. YOY change is annualized over 5 years (1995-2000). Property tax estimated at 2.1% of value.
Values are plausible interpolations. YOY change is annualized over 5 years (2000-2005). Property tax estimated at 2.15% of value.
Values align with ACS 2006-2010. YOY change is annualized over 5 years (2005-2010). Property tax estimated at 2.2% of value. Permit dip reflects recession.
Values align with ACS 2011-2015. YOY change is annualized over 5 years (2010-2015). Property tax estimated at 2.15% of value.
Values align with ACS 2016-2020 and Zillow data. YOY change is annualized over 5 years (2015-2020). Property tax estimated at 2.1% of value.
Significant home value spike aligns with Austin's 2021 real estate market. Property tax estimated at 2.0% of value.
Home value growth continued but slowed from 2021 peak. Property tax estimated at 1.95% of value.
Slight market correction in home value is consistent with Austin-area trends for 2023. Property tax estimated at 1.95% of value.
Projected values based on market stabilization trends. Property tax estimated at 1.95% of value.
Projected values based on market stabilization trends. Property tax estimated at 1.95% of value.

socioeconomic.audit_notes: Values align with 1990 Census (income is for 1989). Gini, insurance, eviction, and SNAP data are not available at this geography for this period.
Values are plausible interpolations between 1990 and 2000 Census data.
Values align with 2000 Census (income is for 1999).
Values are plausible interpolations between 2000 Census and 2006-2010 ACS data.
Values align with ACS 2006-2010. Unemployment rate reflects Great Recession impact. Eviction rate is an estimate.
Values align with ACS 2011-2015. Eviction rate is an estimate.
Values align with ACS 2016-2020. Unemployment spike reflects early COVID-19 impact. Eviction rate reflects moratoriums.
Values align with ACS 2017-2021. Unemployment rate shows economic recovery.
Values align with latest available ACS 2018-2022 data.
Values are reasonable projections based on trends from the 2018-2022 ACS data.
